build.beforeBuildCommand: cd ../../.. && npm run build:desktop && node apps/desktop/scripts/prepare-sidecar.mjs

security.csp: default-src 'self' http://127.0.0.1:* https://*.supabase.co; connect-src 'self' http://127.0.0.1:* https://*.supabase.co https://api.anthropic.com; img-src 'self' data:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval'
